summary: Completed testing of Medicine Detail page transaction tabs. All features verified: /api/products/{sku}/transactions endpoint returns linked transactions, all 4 transaction tabs (Purchases, Sales, Pur. Return, Sales Return) display actual transaction data with correct columns and record counts. Status badges show correct colors (paid/confirmed=green, due=red).

backend: Response includes product_sku, product_name, sales[], purchases[], sales_returns[], purchase_returns[]
Sales array: 2 records with bill_number, date, customer_name, batch_no, quantity, unit_price, discount, line_total, status
Purchases array: 4 records with purchase_number, date, supplier_name, supplier_invoice, batch_no, quantity, cost_price, mrp, line_total, status
Sales Returns array: 2 records with return_number, date, customer_name, original_invoice, batch_no, quantity, refund_amount, status
Purchase Returns array: 2 records with return_number, date, supplier_name, original_purchase, batch_no, quantity, reason, line_total, status
Transaction type filter parameter works (all, sales, purchases)
Status values are valid: paid, due for sales; confirmed, draft for purchases
frontend: Navigate to /inventory/product/3004 loads Paracetamol 500mg detail page
6 tabs present: Batches, Purchases, Pur. Return, Sales, Sales Return, Ledger
Purchases tab shows 4 records with columns: Purchase #, Date, Supplier, Invoice #, Batch, Qty, Cost, MRP, Total, Status
Sales tab shows 2 records with columns: Bill #, Date, Customer, Batch, Qty, Unit Price, Discount, Total, Status
Pur. Return tab shows 2 records with columns: Return #, Date, Supplier, Original Purchase, Batch, Qty, Reason, Amount, Status
Sales Return tab shows 2 records with columns: Return #, Date, Customer, Original Invoice, Batch, Qty, Refund Amount, Status
Record counts displayed correctly (e.g., '4 records', '2 records')
Status badges with correct colors: paid=green, due=red, confirmed=green
Transaction data fetched on tab click via /api/products/{sku}/transactions

critical_code_review_comments: MedicineDetail.js correctly implements fetchTransactions() which calls /api/products/{sku}/transactions
Transaction data is fetched lazily when user clicks on transaction tabs (purchases, sales, pur_return, sales_return)
Status badge colors properly implemented: paid/confirmed=green-100/green-700, due=red-100/red-700, draft=gray-100/gray-700
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
API endpoint properly filters transactions by product SKU matching in both product_sku and product_name fields
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing product SKU 3004 (Paracetamol 500mg) which has 4 purchases, 2 sales, 2 purchase returns, 2 sales returns.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Medicine Detail page at /inventory/product/:sku fully tested with all transaction tabs working. Product SKU 3004 (Paracetamol 500mg) has transaction history. API endpoint /api/products/{sku}/transactions returns linked transactions from bills, purchases, and returns collections. Login selectors: data-testid='login-email-input', data-testid='login-password-input', form selector: [data-testid='login-form'] button[type='submit']. Tab selectors: data-testid='tab-purchases', data-testid='tab-sales', data-testid='tab-pur_return', data-testid='tab-sales_return'. Table selectors: data-testid='purchases-table', data-testid='sales-table', data-testid='purchase-returns-table', data-testid='sales-returns-table'.
